_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: The stablecoin growth and MVRV undervaluation signal accumulation beneath the surface, but divergent ETF/VIX/funding factors mean any upward drift toward Disbelief will likely be choppy and require confirmation rather than conviction.
next_move.brains_agree: No — the analyst calls HOLD with chop in Disbelief while the narrative implies an UP reversal toward a risk-on regime; consensus leans toward the analyst's caution but acknowledges the accumulation narrative's merit.
next_move.confirmed_if: fear_greed rises above 35 with BTC momentum sustaining above 55 and funding cooling below 45
next_move.invalidated_if: fear_greed drops below 20 with VIX spiking above 75 and BTC momentum rolling over below 40
